summary: Total Value Locked (TVL) across all of DeFi grew from effectively zero in 2018-2019 (~$0.6B end-2019) to ~$15B at the end of 2020 during 'DeFi Summer', then exploded to an all-time high of ~$177.5B on 2021-11-09 (widely cited as ~$178-180B) during the 2021 bull market. The 2022 collapse — driven by the Terra/LUNA implosion (May 2022), Three Arrows Capital, Celsius, and FTX (Nov 2022) — crushed TVL ~78% to a year-end-2022 value of ~$38B, with the cycle low around ~$38-42B in late 2022 / mid-2023. A slow recovery took TVL to ~$53B end-2023 and ~$116B end-2024, then a strong 2025 run to a near-record ~$171B in October 2025 (CoinDesk: ~$170B in mid-Sep 2025, fully erasing Terra-era losses; never quite reclaiming the 2021 ATH on DefiLlama's consistent methodology). A sharp drawdown followed: TVL fell through H1 2026 amid a broad crypto selloff and ~$746M of Q2-2026 exploits, reaching ~$74.5B as of 2026-06-16. All figures use DefiLlama's consistent cross-chain methodology as the primary series; note that other trackers (DappRadar, some press) cite higher numbers (e.g. $202B 2021 peak, $237B in 2025) due to different inclusion/double-counting rules.

series.label: Total DeFi TVL (DefiLlama, all chains) - year-end values

points.note: End of 2019; DeFi nascent. DefiLlama API.
End of 2020, after 'DeFi Summer'. DefiLlama API.
End of 2021, off the Nov ATH. DefiLlama API.
End of 2022, post Terra/LUNA + FTX collapse, ~78% below ATH. DefiLlama API.
End of 2023, early recovery. DefiLlama API.
End of 2024, recovery accelerating. DefiLlama API.
End of 2025, after pulling back from the Oct 2025 ~$171B local peak. DefiLlama API.
Latest 2026 value (current); sharp H1-2026 drawdown amid market selloff and exploits. DefiLlama API.

series.label: Total DeFi TVL (DefiLlama, all chains) - intra-year peak values

points.note: 2021 peak = all-time high, Nov 9, 2021 ($177.48B); widely cited as ~$178-180B. DefiLlama API.
2022 peak (Jan 5, 2022) before the collapse. DefiLlama API.
2025 peak (Oct 7, 2025); CoinDesk reported ~$170B Sep 18, 2025, erasing Terra-era losses. DefiLlama API.
2026 peak so far (Jan 18, 2026) before H1 decline. DefiLlama API.

key_facts.claim: Independent cross-check of current value: TVL dropped to ~$72.5B in Q2 2026 amid selloff and security concerns

key_facts.value: ~$38-42B (DefiLlama ~$38B year-end; CoinDesk cites $42B low in Oct 2022)

key_facts.claim: 2025 recovery: TVL hit ~$170B, fully erasing Terra/LUNA-era bear-market losses
H1 2026 decline driven partly by exploits: ~70 protocols hit, ~$746M lost in Q2 2026

Methodology note: alternative trackers cite higher peaks (CoinDesk $202B for Jan-2021-to-Apr-2022 cycle; DappRadar $237B in Q3 2025) due to broader inclusion/double-counting vs DefiLlama's consistent series

top_entities.name: DefiLlama
top_entities.metric: Primary aggregate DeFi TVL data source (consistent cross-chain methodology)
